text: The department shall adopt rules to implement and administer this chapter, including rules specifying how notice shall be given of a prohibition or limitation approved under this chapter.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 3
### Chapter 26. Aquatic Aircraft
##### § 26.004 — Rules

The department shall adopt rules to implement and administer this chapter, including rules specifying how notice shall be given of a prohibition or limitation approved under this chapter.

*Added by Acts 1999, 76th Leg., ch. 820, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1999.*

subsections.text: The department shall adopt rules to implement and administer this chapter, including rules specifying how notice shall be given of a prohibition or limitation approved under this chapter.
